steps.action: Import FACT_CATEGORIES from src.distill and inspect keys
steps.expected: Dict contains 'error' and 'solution' keys with descriptions
steps.observed: FACT_CATEGORIES contains 'error': 'Error conditions encountered and their symptoms' and 'solution': 'Fixes and workarounds for specific errors'

steps.action: Inspect extract_facts_llm() prompt string in src/distill.py
steps.expected: Prompt Rules section includes error and solution category definitions
steps.observed: Prompt includes: '"error" = specific error conditions worth remembering (include error text, affected component, and trigger conditions)' and '"solution" = the fix or workaround for a specific error (reference what error it solves)'

steps.action: Check for error/solution pair extraction guidance
steps.expected: Prompt instructs to extract BOTH error and solution as separate facts
steps.observed: Prompt includes: 'When you find an error/solution pair, extract BOTH as separate facts' with detailed guidance for each

steps.action: Inspect extract_facts_llm() prompt string for Example section
steps.expected: Prompt includes an example showing error fact and matching solution fact
steps.observed: Prompt contains Example section with CORS preflight error fact (category: 'error') and corresponding fix fact (category: 'solution'), each with compressed_details

steps.action: Verify FACT_CATEGORIES in distill.py has error and solution
Verify LLM prompt in distill.py references error/solution
steps.expected: Prompt includes category rules for error and solution
steps.observed: Prompt Rules section defines both categories; extraction guidance and examples present

steps.action: Verify memory_add_fact valid set in mcp_server.py includes error/solution
Verify memory_search_facts can display facts with error/solution categories
steps.expected: Output format uses r['category'] which works for any category string
steps.observed: memory_search_facts formats output as [#{id}] [{category}] which displays any category. Docstring also lists error and solution in the category parameter help text.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. All error/solution category support verified across FACT_CATEGORIES dict, LLM prompt rules and examples, mcp_server.py validation set, and search display.
